overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a moonlit natural landscape in a video game, likely Red Dead Redemption 2. The player character walks along a rocky riverbank at night, passing pine trees and rocky outcrops, with a distant settlement visible in the valley below. The atmosphere is dark and moody with heavy cloud cover.

grassy slope with scattered vegetation underfoot

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a grassy hillside at night, moving toward a river. The camera passes a tall pine tree on the left while a large rocky cliff face looms ahead on the left. The river becomes visible to the right as the terrain transitions from grass to rocky shore.

agents.ego_description: walking along the rocky river bank with mist rising from the water

segments.scene_description: Walking along the rocky river shoreline with the water close on the right. A large fallen log lies on the shore. The rocky cliff face recedes into the distance on the left. Mist rises from the river surface, and a game interaction prompt briefly appears.

scene_state.functional_zone: riverside path approaching wooded valley with distant settlement

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path toward a prominent dead tree with settlement lights visible in the distant valley

entered.detail: large dead tree with bare branches silhouetted against the sky
small village or settlement with lights visible in the valley below

segments.scene_description: The path continues along the river as the camera approaches a distinctive dead tree. The rocky cliffs have faded from view, and a distant settlement with lights becomes visible in the valley ahead. The river remains visible on the right but at a greater distance as the terrain opens up.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a secluded grassy hillside down toward a wide, moonlit river valley. It begins by descending through grass and passing a tall pine tree, with a massive rocky cliff face looming on the left as the terrain transitions into a rocky shore. As the camera moves along the riverbank, the cliff recedes into the distance and mist begins to rise from the water's surface, passing a large fallen log on the shore. The scene then opens up as the camera approaches a distinctive dead tree, with the river shifting further to the right. Finally, the landscape expands to reveal a distant settlement with flickering lights nestled in the valley ahead.
